PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX psn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?manager ?managerLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q57162840 wdt:P710 ?rider .
  ?rider p:P2347 / psn:P2347 ?gapNode .
  ?gapNode wikibase:quantityAmount ?gapAmount .
  FILTER(xsd:decimal(?gapAmount) > 1)
  ?rider wdt:P108 ?team .
  ?team wdt:P10251 ?manager .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?manager rdfs:label ?managerLabel .
    FILTER(lang(?managerLabel) = "en")
  }
}
ORDER BY ?gapAmount
LIMIT 1
